title: Take's Armory
description: The mod adds new types of Vanilla-style weapons. Compatible with BetterCombat.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87e1f0a1aab6db1623bc0822d8f37719467bd825.png)


The mod adds new types of Vanilla-style weapons. 
Mod adds:
- Daggers (iron, gold, diamond, netherite)
- Spears (iron, gold, diamond, netherite)
- Rapiers (iron, gold, diamond, netherite)
- Hammers (iron, gold, diamond, netherite)
- Katanas (iron, gold, diamond, netherite)
- Claymores (iron, gold, diamond, netherite)
- Halberds (iron, gold, diamond, netherite)
- Sickles (iron, gold, diamond, netherite)
- Staff (only iron)

Compatible with BetterCombat.
